title: GodWeapons+
description: This plugin adds a God Mace and a God Spear to the game.
body:
This plugin adds a God Mace, God Spear and God Sword to the game!
Here are the commands for the plugin
/godweapons reload
/godweapons give all
/godweapons give mace
/godweapons give spear
/godweapons give sword
In the config.yml, you can edit the enchants on the mace and the spear and add new enchants!
And you can edit the dash cooldown, the strength of the dash and the vertical boost!
To activate the dash, you need the mace, hold the mace and shift left click in the direction you want to dash!

The God Sword gives you infinite strength 2 and speed 1 by default, you can edit and add new effects in the config.yml!

Join the Discord server to tell me what plugins I should make next, and join for support on this plugin as well!
